title: 第一个远程 Doc2Repo 训练集：代码代理超越错误修复，从头开始构建存储库
description: DeNovoSWE 是一个用于训练代码代理从头开始生成完整存储库的数据集，包含 4,818 个真实任务实例。
titleZh: 第一个远程 Doc2Repo 训练集：代码代理超越错误修复，从头开始构建存储库
titleEn: The First Long-Range Doc2Repo Training Set: Code Agents Go Beyond Bug Fixing to Build Repositories from Scratch
descriptionZh: DeNovoSWE 是一个用于训练代码代理从头开始生成完整存储库的数据集，包含 4,818 个真实任务实例。
descriptionEn: DeNovoSWE is a dataset for training code agents to generate complete repositories from scratch, containing 4,818 real-world task instances. Through structured documentation and rigorous validation mechanisms, it helps agents master complex system-building capabilities, rather than just fixing code. This provides key support for code agents to advance toward higher-level software engineering tasks.
